    Note: This event fires whether the player is actively using a shield or not. Vanilla shield blocking logic is captured and passed into the event via #getOriginalBlock(). If this is true, The shield item stack "should" be available from LivingEntity#getUseItem() at least for players. - Section in class net.neoforged.neoforge.event.entity.living.LivingShieldBlockEvent
